{ "name": "mpociot/reflection-docblock", "type": "library", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ {"name": "Mike van Riel", "email": "mike.vanriel@naenius.com"} ], "require": { "php": ">=5.3.3" }, "autoload": { "psr-0": {"Mpociot": ["src/"]} }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "~4.0" }, "suggest": { "dflydev/markdown": "~1.0", "erusev/parsedown": "~1.0" }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "2.0.x-dev" } } }
